chapter_title.en: Winter as the believer's spiritual spring

parts.text: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ مَاجِيلَوَيْهِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع يَقُولُ اَلشِّتَاءُ رَبِيعُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ يَطُولُ فِيهِ لَيْلُهُ فَيَسْتَعِينُ بِهِ عَلَى قِيَامِهِ.

en.badr-shahin: Mohammad bin Ali Majilwayh, Allah may have mercy upon him, narrated to us from… Mohammed bin Sulaiman ad-Dailami that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Winter is the believer’s spring. Its long nights help the believer offer his rites of worship.
